chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Acq. Appeal No.S-49 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA No.1857/2024 3. For hearing of main case 19-5-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional Prosecutor General -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- On 24-03-2025, following order was passed:- “None present for the appellant; no intimation is received. This appeal is liable to be dismissed for non-prosecution; however, in the interest of justice, adjourned to 28.04.2025, for which intimation notice be issued to counsel for the appellant.” Thereafter, the matter was taken up on 28-04-2025, even on the said date none appeared for the appellant. Today is also the same position none present for the appellant, nor has any intimation been received, which shows that the appellant is not interested to proceed with the matter. As a result thereof, instant Crl. Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Naveed Ali
